parameter_variables.name: k
parameter_variables.description: module dimension selected by parameter set

parameter_variables.name: eta1
parameter_variables.description: CBD parameter for sampling s and e in K-PKE.KeyGen and y in K-PKE.Encrypt

parameter_variables.name: eta2
parameter_variables.description: CBD parameter for sampling e1 and e2 in K-PKE.Encrypt

parameter_variables.name: du
parameter_variables.description: compression and encoding parameter for ciphertext component u

parameter_variables.name: dv
parameter_variables.description: compression and encoding parameter for ciphertext component v
